code:
%%{FinTech_AuthVault}}}%% stateDiagram-v2 [FinTech_TransactionQueue] --> Pending: Create Comment Pending --> Approved: Approve Pending --> Rejected: Reject Pending --> Deleted: Delete Approved --> Deleted: Delete Rejected --> Deleted: Delete Deleted --> [FinTech_LedgerService] state Pending {FinTech_FraudDetection] --> AwaitingModeration AwaitingModeration --> [FinTech_PaymentGateway] } state Approved {FinTech_PaymentGateway] --> Visible Visible --> Edited: Update Edited --> Visible } state Rejected {FinTech_TransactionQueue] --> Hidden Hidden --> WithReason: Add Rejection Reason WithReason --> [FinTech_AuthVault] } note right of Pending: Comments start in Pending state
and await moderation note right of Approved: Approved comments are visible
and can be edited note right of Rejected: Rejected comments are hidden
with optional rejection reason note right of Deleted: Deleted comments are
permanently removed

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为评论系统设计一个状态流转图，核心是从TransactionQueue创建评论后先进入Pending状态，经过FraudDetection和PaymentGateway的审核后才能确定最终去向。
明白了，Pending是一个复合状态，内部包含AwaitingModeration，并且FraudDetection指向它，然后AwaitingModeration再连到PaymentGateway。那Pending之后有哪些出口？
Pending可以走向三个方向：Approved、Rejected，或者直接Deleted。Approved和Rejected各自也是复合状态，Deleted则是终态，直接流转到LedgerService做归档。
好的，我先画出主框架：Pending分出三条线到Approved、Rejected、Deleted，然后Deleted指向LedgerService。现在细化Approved内部——PaymentGateway之后是Visible状态，Visible可以Update到Edited，Edited还能回到Visible，形成编辑循环。
对的，Approved这条线没问题。Rejected这边类似，TransactionQueue进来后是Hidden状态，需要支持Add Rejection Reason到WithReason，最后WithReason要回到AuthVault做审计记录。
确认一下：Rejected内部的入口是TransactionQueue，不是PaymentGateway？另外Approved和Rejected如果走Delete，也是直接到Deleted状态吗？
是的，Rejected的入口是TransactionQueue，代表评论来源。Approved和Rejected都可以Delete，这两条Delete线都要加上。最后给四个主要状态加上右侧注释说明。

完成：Pending注释写"Comments start in Pending state and await moderation"，Approved注释"Approved comments are visible and can be edited"，Rejected注释"Rejected comments are hidden with optional rejection reason"，Deleted注释"Deleted comments are permanently removed"。所有状态流转和复合状态结构都已对齐。
检查完毕，结构清晰，从创建、审核、发布到删除的完整生命周期都覆盖到了，特别是FraudDetection和PaymentGateway在审核链中的位置很准确。
